headline: HP (HPQ) Valuation Check After Short Term Rebound And 1 Year Share Price Weakness
summary: HP stock in focus: recent performance snapshot HP (HPQ) continues to attract attention as investors weigh its recent share performance against the company’s current fundamentals, including revenue of US$56.2b and net income of US$2.5b. Over the past month, the stock shows a return of about 12.8%, with a past 3 months return near 6.8%, while the 1 year total return sits around a 16.2% decline. See our latest analysis for HP.
